description: Configuration file for an Astro project, setting up build options, integrations, plugins, and environment-specific site URL determination.

methods.name: defineConfig
methods.description: Function to define and export Astro configuration settings.

methods.name: getConfig
methods.description: Function to retrieve project-specific configuration, such as baseURL and docs_version.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.description: Function to initialize or configure Astro integrations.

methods.name: algoliaPlugin
methods.description: Function returning the Algolia search plugin configuration.

methods.name: stackblitzPlugin
methods.description: Function returning the StackBlitz plugin configuration.
